summary: Full stabilization of shio-walk project, fixing authentication, walk lifecycle, and data consistency issues.

achievements.details: Implemented missing :register re-frame event, fixed password validation (8+ chars), and verified user creation flow.
Stabilized active walk UI by splitting local state updates and server syncing. Fixed :walks-loaded to correctly handle API response maps.
Resolved 'Hyphen vs Underscore' naming convention mismatch across all backend handlers. Fixed distance-meters being reset to 0 and UUID parsing errors ('nil' string issue).
Added missing rewards_unlocked sync logic in db/check-and-unlock-rewards! and fixed statistical display keys.
Implemented :clear-error handler and error 'Close' button functionality.

technical_debt_resolved: Unified naming convention enforcement between DB results and API responses.
Eliminated race conditions between optimistic updates and API reloads.
